creator: rsmith@xs4all.nl
text:
On Tue, Feb 16, 2010 at 09:47:08AM +0000, Ivan wrote:
> 
> >Number:         143992
> >Category:       amd64
> >Synopsis:       Random reboot
<snip>
> >How-To-Repeat:
> Rendom reboot, uptime 1-12 days max.

If the reboots do not corrolate to any system activity, it is probably a
hardware problem. Monitor the CPU temperature and the different
voltages. Maybe that will give you a clue. Check that all the cables inside
are connected properly.

Roland
--
